headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Software Gains; This Aluminum Stock Soars Amid Iran Attacks (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones index rose Monday on the latest U.S.-Iran war news. Fed Chair Powell is due to speak just after the market open.

headline: Travelers Announces 2026 Personal Insurance Agents of the Year
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., March 30, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced the recipients of its 2026 Personal Insurance Agent of the Year Award, honoring nine independent agents who have a strong partnership with Travelers and demonstrate exceptional customer service, community involvement and long-term profitable growth. The recipients accepted their awards last week at the annual Travelers Leadership Conference for top independent agents and brokers.

headline: Stressed by the price of car insurance? These tips can help lower costs
summary: If car insurance is straining your budget, try shopping around before taking more drastic steps.
